symptoms.symptom_name: Sudden severe dyspnoea worsening over 12 hours

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Rapidly progressive dyspnoea reflects falling cardiac output from impaired filling.
Acute dyspnoea is also a leading PE feature — cannot be excluded remotely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Relief sitting forward; near-syncope and worsening dyspnoea on leaning back

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Postural, preload-dependent symptoms are characteristic of a large pericardial effusion under pressure.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute myocardial infarction / acute coronary syndrome
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Marked positional dependence is atypical for coronary ischaemia.
Cerebral hypoperfusion from critically low stroke volume — a decompensation marker.
Pericarditis is the antecedent lesion; a pericardial effusion accumulating under pressure is the feared complication.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chest sensation changed from sharp/pleuritic to constant heavy pressure

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Transition from pleuritic pericarditic pain to constant pressure suggests effusion replacing dry inflammation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Cold, clammy, cyanosed peripheries; pale and diaphoretic

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Peripheral vasoconstriction and cyanosis indicate shock; patient/carer can observe these, so admissible in telehealth (unverified).
A limb of Beck's triad — fluid between the heart and stethoscope; clinician-only, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Markedly elevated JVP (to the angle of the jaw while sitting)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Raised systemic venous pressure from impaired right-heart filling — a limb of Beck's triad; clinician-only.

symptoms.symptom_name: Pulsus paradoxus (>10 mmHg inspiratory systolic drop; palpable pulse weakening)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Exaggerated inspiratory fall in systolic BP from ventricular interdependence — highly specific; requires a cuff/clinician, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Hypotension 85/70 with narrowed pulse pressure (~15 mmHg)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A limb of Beck's triad and narrowed pulse pressure indicate low stroke volume; measured value sealed — the AI infers shock from lightheadedness/peripheral signs, not a measured BP.
Compensatory tachycardia and tachypnoea sustaining output; clinician-measured, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Echocardiography: large pericardial effusion with RV diastolic collapse and plethoric IVC

investigation_details.expected_result: Large pericardial effusion; right ventricular diastolic collapse; plethoric (non-collapsing) inferior vena cava
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Tamponade goes unconfirmed; but it is a hospital investigation — in telehealth the correct action is emergency transport, not to await imaging.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: RV diastolic collapse with a large effusion and plethoric IVC is diagnostic of tamponade; never available in real-time telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Bilateral equal breath sounds, no tracheal deviation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Equal breath sounds and a midline trachea exclude tension pneumothorax; clinician-only finding, sealed.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Muffled heart sounds + elevated JVP + hypotension together are the classic triad of tamponade — but all three are clinician-only and sealed; the AI Doctor cannot assemble this triad and must escalate on the history instead.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Emergency department assessment with bedside echocardiography
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Definitive confirmation and drainage (pericardiocentesis) are hospital-based; the telehealth action is to trigger emergency transport, not to arrange outpatient imaging.
To exclude the parallel life-threats (ACS) en route/on arrival — cannot be obtained in telehealth.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Home blood-pressure/oximeter self-measurement as a basis to delay transport
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Do NOT wait to gather home readings before escalating; the history alone warrants immediate 000. Time spent measuring delays definitive care.
